title: bidens mollifolia
intro: Bidens mollifolia, also known as Beggarticks or Blackseed, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its seeds, which contain a compound called nigellone, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidens mollifolia include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as supporting immune function and digestion. Bidens mollifolia is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
